samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output data_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description: Implement a module for pulse detection. Clock signal. Reset signal (active low). One-bit input signal. Output signal indicating the presence of pulses. Initial state of the pulse detection process. State indicating that a pulse is detected. State indicating that a pulse is detected. State indicating the end of a pulse. Declare a register state to keep track of the current state of the pulse detection process. Initialize state to S0. state = S0; Declare a register data_out to keep track of the output signal. Initialize data_out to 0. data_out = 0; State transition logic. case (state) S0: begin if (data_in == 1'b1) begin state <= S1; end end S1: begin if (data_in == 1'b0) begin state <= S2; end end S2: begin if (data_in == 1'b1) begin state <= S3; end end S3: begin if (data_in == 1'b0) begin state <= S0; end end endcase Output logic. case (state) S3: begin data_out = 1'b1; end default: begin data_out = 1'b0; end endcase Implement the pulse detection process. always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (~rst_n) begin state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0; end else begin case (state) S0: begin if (data_in == 1'b1) begin state <= S1; end end S1: begin if (data_in == 1'b0) begin state <= S2; end end S2: begin if (data_in == 1'b1) begin state <= S3; end end S3: begin if (data_in == 1'b0) begin state <= S0; end end endcase end end always @(*) begin case (state) S3: begin data_out = 1'b1; end default: begin data_out = 1'b0; end endcase end
